title: Node.js setup step appears unused; all run steps use Bun
reasoning: The workflow sets up both Bun (line 26-29) and Node.js 20 (line 31-34), but every `run:` step invokes `bun`. If Node.js is not required by a dependency's install script or native build tooling, this step adds unnecessary setup time and creates confusion about the actual runtime. If it IS required, the intent is not documented.
recommendation: Either remove the Node.js setup step if no dependency requires it, or add a comment explaining why it is needed (e.g., a native module that expects `node` on PATH during postinstall).
whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: No tests are included; this is a workflow configuration concern.
minimumFixScope: Remove the setup-node step or add an explanatory comment.
